query:
ALTER TABLE communications
  ADD COLUMN editedAt TIMESTAMP NULL,
  ADD COLUMN editedById INT NULL,
  ADD COLUMN originalBody TEXT NULL,
  ADD CONSTRAINT fk_comm_editedBy FOREIGN KEY (editedById) REFERENCES users(id);
